query:
INSERT INTO banners (name, slot, imageUrl, clickUrl, weight, startsAt, endsAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
  ('ProofPress Verify — Il mondo è pieno di fake', 'left', 
   'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/99304667/UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg/banners/1778826724322-ppverify.png',
   'https://proofpressverify.com', 10,
   NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 365 DAY), NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Fasteer — Legacy Code Modernized 90% cheaper', 'left',
   'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/99304667/UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg/banners/1778826724322-fasteer.png',
   'https://fasteer.ai', 9,
   NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 365 DAY), NOW(), NOW());
command:
